description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a sharply pointed nose and angular, swept-back wings. The body is predominantly metallic bronze with black and blue accents, giving it a high-tech, stealthy appearance. Twin large jet engines are mounted on either side of the fuselage, integrated into the wing roots, and feature blue-lit exhausts. The wings are mid-mounted with pronounced anhedral angles and small winglets at the tips, while the tail section features twin vertical stabilizers and a single horizontal stabilizer. The cockpit is forward-mounted, enclosed with a tinted canopy, and appears to be designed for a single pilot. The overall design suggests a high-speed, maneuverable aircraft, possibly for advanced military or urban defense applications.
description: A futuristic, angular airplane with swept-back wings, twin jet engines, and a forward-mounted cockpit in a metallic bronze and black color scheme.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and large twin jet intakes flanking the fuselage.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated nose, mid-mounted swept wings, and the integration of engines into the wing roots.
description_view_2: Rear-top view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, horizontal stabilizer, and blue-lit engine exhausts.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the angular wing design and streamlined fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept-back wings, pronounced anhedral angle, and small upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the wing roots with visible rear exhausts.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a single horizontal stabilizer, forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear; specific gear units not visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a tinted canopy.
